channel.title: Dev on Automaly
channel.description: Recent content in Dev on Automaly
channel.managingEditor: luan52@outlook.com (Hi there, this is Max Nguyen)
channel.webMaster: luan52@outlook.com (Hi there, this is Max Nguyen)

item.title: The Requested Performance Counter is Not a Custom Counter
item.author: luan52@outlook.com (Hi there, this is Max Nguyen)
item.description: How to fix the ‘The Requested Performance Counter is not a Custom Counter’ error in Dynamics 365 F&O one-box VHD environments by re-registering instrumentation DLLs and rebuilding Windows Performance Counters.

item.title: Data Entity Tips
item.author: luan52@outlook.com (Hi there, this is Max Nguyen)
item.description: Comprehensive overview of integration patterns and capabilities between Dynamics 365 applications and Microsoft Dataverse for seamless data connectivity.
